reviews.review_text:
If I could give zero stars I would! This was the worst campsite we have ever stayed on in 40+ years camping around the world! Scruffy, full of dilapidated caravans/living? sheds, grounds barely tended, old falling down buildings including the "amenities". Our "pitch" was a scruffy bit of concrete, toilets and showers so dirty that we didn't want to risk a shower. No campsite kitchen, nowhere to wash up, no potable water.... the list is endless.
For all this, we were charged A$70!
Having stayed on 25+ campsites from Cairns southwards paying A$20-55 for wonderful facilities, this was a massive disappointment as the area is so beautiful.
We felt taken for a ride as we had driven a long way before we could find this place in desperation! Captive audience.
DO NOT STOP HERE- some much nicer sites just a bit further on after the ferry, as we discovered the morning after.
I am fuming 😡😡😡😡
$50 for a none powered camping site with rundown facilities. I wouldn’t bother staying here there are better places.

Camped here for a night and it was wonderful ! Had the waterside camping and the view was beautiful. The new owners are so nice and welcoming. Bathrooms and shower was clean. Was an amazing stay, will definitely be back soon :)
Lovely caravan park, with great and friendly management. Would come here again!
